originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__k_crcs_1621' is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'k_crcs' is never read
model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
reasoning: k_crcs is assigned at L21 in 5275b1e49f6.c (inside VERSION_CHECKING block) but is overwritten at L25 before any read (if r=T) or never read (if r=F, goto out). Dead store is real and new. PC = !_STDLIB_H AND !__need_malloc_and_calloc — only restrictive library macros, no real feature flags. Bug fires in all compilable VERSION_CHECKING=T configs, so PC is over-constrained.
